moduleDescription: Standard Practices (STDP) topics for the Transport Canada M rating (based on the TC guide).

sets.name: 1 – Mathematics and Physics
sets.subtitle: Shop math, measurement, motion, stress/strain, energy, matter, gas laws/fluids and atmosphere.
outline: Shop mathematics, graphs and charts — theory/application (1.1)
Stress/strain, energy/work, matter, gas laws/fluids, atmosphere (1.4–1.8)

sets.name: 2 – Electricity and Electronics
sets.subtitle: Electrical safety, sources, batteries, magnetism, DC/AC, wiring, semiconductors, motors, protection and number systems.
outline: Sources of electrical energy + batteries — theory/application (2.2–2.3)
Magnetism, DC/AC, power distribution, wiring practices (2.4–2.8)
Logic/ICs/semiconductors, motors, relays, protection, load analysis, number systems (2.9–2.19)

sets.name: 3 – Aircraft Hardware
sets.subtitle: Specifications/standards, rivets/fasteners, cables, bearings, gears, electrical hardware, lines/fittings and sealants.

sets.name: 4 – Aircraft Drawing
sets.subtitle: Types of drawings, interpretation of drawings/diagrams/charts and station diagrams.
outline: Interpretation of drawings, diagrams and charts — theory/application (4.2)

sets.name: 5 – Weight and Balance
sets.subtitle: CG limits/range plus weighing procedures and calculations.
outline: C of G design limits and range — knowledge/application (5.1)

sets.name: 6 – Metallurgy and Corrosion Prevention
sets.subtitle: Corrosion types, inspection, removal/treatment and heat treatment/temper designations.
outline: Heat treatment, annealing and temper designation — theory/application (6.4)

sets.name: 7 – Nondestructive Testing
sets.subtitle: NDT inspection techniques: theory, types and application.
outline: Inspection techniques — theory, types and application (7.1)

sets.name: 8 – General Servicing and Standard Practices
sets.subtitle: Fire protection, jacking/hoisting/levelling, ground servicing equipment, fueling/defueling, aviation fluids.
outline: Fire protection — types, prevention and extinguishing (8.1)
Aviation fluids including fuel and additive — types/application (8.5)

sets.name: 9 – Tools and Measuring Devices
sets.subtitle: Hand tools, power tools, measuring devices and test equipment.

sets.name: 10 – Aircraft Sheet Metal, Tubular, Wood and Composite Structures
sets.subtitle: Sheet metal, fabrics, wood, composites, welding and rivet layout/installation.
outline: Rivet layout patterns and installation — theory/application (10.6)
